description: As an IT Security & Compliance Officer, process a Certificate of Destruction for a batch of hard drives. Create a new status label named 'Destroyed - Verified' with the type 'Archived'. Update the status of assets 'HD-DISP-001', 'HD-DISP-002', 'HD-DISP-003', and 'HD-DISP-004' to 'Destroyed - Verified' and upload the document '/home/ga/Documents/Certificate_of_Destruction_Q3.pdf' to each of their records. Do not modify asset 'HD-DISP-005'; it must remain in its original 'Pending Disposal' status with no files attached.
